name: @markdown-contract/example-single-binary-nitro
description: The Nitro variant of the M-0008 'one binary, two faces' example (D-0012 §D3): the same Bun-compiled executable — CLI when run bare, loopback daemon under `daemon` — but with the daemon face served by a real Nitro server (Nuxt server routes, `serveStatic: 'inline'`) instead of a hand-rolled Bun.serve + embed manifest. De-risks the M-0009 Nitro productionization path.

scripts.build:binary: bun run build:ui && bun run compile
